overview: Sequel to Ghost of Tsushima set in 1603 Hokkaido around Mount Yotei. Features a new protagonist in a new era of Japanese history with evolved combat and exploration mechanics.
coreMechanics: Enhanced stance system from first game

terminology.Yotei: Sacred mountain in Hokkaido, central to the game
terminology.1603: Time period - end of Sengoku period, start of Edo

commonQuestions: Is this a direct sequel to Ghost of Tsushima?
What time period is this set in?
Are the mechanics similar to the first game?
Is it set in the same region?
insiderTips: Set 329 years after Ghost of Tsushima
Different historical period with different conflicts
Expect refined version of first game's combat
Hokkaido features different terrain - mountains and snow
New protagonist allows fresh story without Jin's baggage

progressionSystem.primary: Expected to evolve from first game's system
progressionSystem.note: Details to be revealed closer to launch

estimatedPlaytime: Expected similar to first game: 25-50 hours
